mentions.note: Preferred over Lululemon. Athleta turnaround thesis.
Athletic division net sales down 12%, same-store sales down 11%. Rebranding effort underway but early. Long turnaround project; trades 9x earnings. Athleisure weakness is secular, not cyclical.

Stock plunged 50%+ on mixed results: Gap brand +10% comps (strong), but Old Navy +1% (seasonal dress weakness), Athleta in rebuild. Trading sub-9x 2026 EPS with solid dividend/buyback. CEO Dickson transparent on execution gaps, not blaming consumer.
